title: Important Tax & Corporate Updates: New Rules, Bill & ICAI Placements
content:
# Important Tax & Corporate Updates: New Rules, Bill & ICAI Placements

Ek important update hai! Government ne direct taxation ke procedural aur compliance systems mein major overhauls announce kiye hain, aur corporate laws mein bhi significant changes propose kiye gaye hain. Saath hi, ICAI ne apni campus placement drive ke registrations bhi open kar diye hain.

Yahaan par kuch key highlights hain:

*   **Income-tax Rules, 2026 Notified:** Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) ne formally Income-tax Rules, 2026 ko notify kar diya hai vide Notification No. 22/2026, dated March 19, 2026. Ye rules Income-tax Act, 2025 ka operational framework April 1, 2026 se enforce karenge, aur Income-tax Rules, 1962 ko replace karenge.
    *   **Aim:** Tax framework ko simplify karna hai, jisme updated PAN requirements, revised allowance limits, aur simplified ITR forms shamil hain.
    *   **Key Changes:** Updated PAN requirements (jaise ₹10 lakh ya usse zyada cash deposits ke liye), House Rent Allowance (HRA) exemption ke liye 8 cities ko 50% category mein include kiya gaya hai (Mumbai, Kolkata, Delhi, Chennai, Hyderabad, Pune, Ahmedabad, aur Bengaluru), Children's Education Allowance aur Hostel Expenditure Allowance ki limits badha di gayi hain, aur ITR forms ki संख्या 511 se 333 aur rules 399 se 190 ho gaye hain.
    *   Valuation aur control ki definitions tighter hongi, valuation certify karne wale professionals ke liye stricter criteria honge, aur dividend declaration ke liye nayi regulations hain jisme companies ko India mein share registers maintain karne aur general meetings hold karne ki requirement hogi.
    *   Stock exchanges par bhi strengthened compliance requirements lagoo hongi, including seven saal tak audit trails maintain karna.

*   **Corporate Laws (Amendment) Bill, 2026 Introduced:** Corporate Laws (Amendment) Bill, 2026 ko Lok Sabha mein March 23, 2026 ko introduce kiya gaya aur subsequent review ke liye Joint Parliamentary Committee ko bheja gaya hai.
    *   **Proposals:** Is Bill mein Companies Act, 2013, aur LLP Act, 2008 mein 107 amendments propose kiye gaye hain, jinka aim startups aur small companies ke liye compliance ease karna, kai procedures ko decriminalize karna, aur governance standards ko enhance karna hai.

*   **ICAI 64th Campus Placement Program:** The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne apne 64th campus placement program ke liye registrations open kar diye hain. Interviews April 6, 2026 se shuru honge.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular for Income-tax Rules, 2026 here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/latest-news/notifications)
*   [Download the Official Corporate Laws (Amendment) Bill, 2026 here](https://loksabhadocs.nic.in/lsspeaker/Bills/the-corporate-laws-amendment-bill-2026-9.pdf)
*   [Visit the Official ICAI Placement Portal here](https://www.icai.org/new_placement/)

*Published on: 25 March 2026*
